title: Hiriluk Learns the Trap
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on hiriluk learns the trap, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Hiriluk Learns the Trap. Hiriluk faces Wapol’s deception and declares that people live on through their dreams before his final sacrifice. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: This is a trap! The MD-20 are perfectly fine as you can see for yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: All you've come here for is to meet your death, Dr. Hilluluuk!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Your crimes are heavy for defying my royal will for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Comm-ence the execution, guards! Take aim!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: thinking that the country was in crisis...

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: But it was all just a little trick instead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahaha! If this country really were in crisis,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A quack doctor like you would be the last person I'd want to come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ignore this quack's worth- less blather and shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You people can't possibly kill me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: When do you think a person dies...?

summary: This part highlights hiriluk learns the trap and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
